task_completion.description: Verify that the 'DevOps & Infrastructure' department has been renamed to 'Infrastructure & Cloud Operations'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Departments' configuration page showing 'Infrastructure & Cloud Operations' in the list of active departments.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Environmental Health & Safety' department has been created with the correct code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Departments' configuration page showing a new entry for 'Environmental Health & Safety' with the department code 'EHS'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the job title codes for Systems Engineer, Network Administrator, and Marketing Specialist have been updated to match federal SOC codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Job Titles' page or individual edit screens showing the updated codes: '17-2199' for Systems Engineer, '15-1244' for Network Administrator, and '13-1161' for Marketing Specialist.

task_completion.description: Verify that Kevin Brown and Amanda Davis have been reassigned to the new Infrastructure & Cloud Operations department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Employees' list or individual employee profiles showing Kevin Brown (EMP009) and Amanda Davis (EMP010) assigned to the 'Infrastructure & Cloud Operations' department.

task_completion.description: Verify that Andrew Thomas and Christopher Lee have been reassigned to their respective new departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Employees' list or individual employee profiles showing Andrew Thomas (EMP017) assigned to 'Environmental Health & Safety' and Christopher Lee (EMP014) assigned to 'Engineering'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Maintenance & Support' department has been deactivated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo 'Departments' list showing 'Maintenance & Support' with an inactive status (e.g., a red cross, inactive label) or absent from the active departments list.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Sentrifugo web interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo HRMS running in a web browser, not just terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels open modifying the DOM text directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated through the application menus to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like navigating the Organization/Departments menus, HR/Employees menus, or form submission screens.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Required Sentrifugo Updates:
1. Rename Dept: 'DevOps & Infrastructure' -> 'Infrastructure & Cloud Operations'.
2. New Dept: 'Environmental Health & Safety' (Code: 'EHS').
3. Deactivated Dept: 'Maintenance & Support'.
4. Job Codes: Systems Engineer (17-2199), Network Administrator (15-1244), Marketing Specialist (13-1161).
5. Employee Assignments: Kevin Brown (EMP009) -> Infrastructure & Cloud Operations; Amanda Davis (EMP010) -> Infrastructure & Cloud Operations; Andrew Thomas (EMP017) -> Environmental Health & Safety; Christopher Lee (EMP014) -> Engineering.
